context: Checkpoint 2026-04-30T21:24Z after continuing Homestead/Studio extensibility slices post-compaction. current_tasks: Pushed and CI-green before this local batch: 4e02e548 `refactor(homestead): scope surface context providers`. CI run 25189037407 succeeded; e2e took ~3m31s, illustrating pipeline cost.

Local commit 1f980843 `feat(app-dev): prove registry validated surfaces`: apps/dev `/surfaces` diagnostics now include a registry-validated external plugin fixture (`external-validated-surface`) that renders text, in addition to internal trusted, failing render, and untrusted external fixtures. The page registers the validated fixture in Tractor registry with status `validated` before shell setup so Homestead exercises the real registry trust gate.

Local commit 6c54c16c `chore(backlog): note e2e pipeline speedups`: added `.pi/todos/e1279bab.md` backlog item with evidence and candidate slices for GitHub Actions E2E speedups. User asked to defer CI optimization and avoid waiting on Actions for every small slice.

Local commit 109bd170 `feat(homestead): share plugin registry helper`: added `registerStudioPluginManifest(...)` to `@refarm.dev/homestead/sdk/plugin-handle` so hosts can reuse registry status setup without hiding host-owned plugin registration. apps/dev `/surfaces` now uses the helper for the validated external fixture.

Local validations passed for the current local batch: `npm --prefix apps/dev test -- surface-diagnostics.test.ts surface-ledger.test.ts`; `npm --prefix apps/dev run type-check`; `npm --prefix apps/dev run build`; `npm --prefix packages/homestead test -- plugin-handle.test.ts`; `npm --prefix packages/homestead run type-check`; `npm run project:validate --silent`; `git diff --check`.

blockers: Do not wait on GitHub Actions for every atomic slice. User preference: reproduce locally, accumulate meaningful work, and only then push/monitor Actions unless explicitly focusing on CI speed.
